Enums representing the types of messages sent in the protocol

public enum MessageType

Fields

Connect = 0
ConnectToUser = 2
ConnectedToServer = 4
Ping = 3
Pong = 8
PortNegotiation = 6
RequestUserList = 1

UserList = 5
